title: Official Muse Video Preview Clips
description: Playable clips published by Meta and Alexandr Wang during the July 7, 2026 preview. Muse Video was still described as coming soon, not generally available.

cases.title: Elephant at a dinner party
cases.prompt: Editorial reconstruction from the official preview: keep a full-size elephant, six guests, table setting, room geometry, reactions, and warm practical light coherent in one comic dinner-party shot.

cases.title: Baby panda tumbling down a grassy slope
cases.prompt: A baby panda tumbling head over heels down a small grassy slope.

cases.title: Four-orange juggling failure and bow
cases.prompt: A man juggles three oranges, adds a fourth, drops them all, and takes a bow anyway. Warm natural morning light, gentle slow motion, one continuous approximately ten-second moment, quiet room tone, and crisp foley.

cases.title: Exactly five ducklings climb a step
cases.prompt: A mother duck leads exactly five ducklings toward a curb; the fifth struggles, then hops up to rejoin the same group. Never add, remove, or duplicate a duckling.

cases.title: Immersive half-frozen pond walk
cases.prompt: First-person night walk beside a half-frozen pond in falling snow, with warm lamplight on dark water, natural handheld gait, footsteps, breeze, reeds, and quiet winter ambience.
